data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for PDF generation for records, but there is no evidence provided that confirms this functionality exists or is operational. The linked use case mentions the need for PDF generation, yet it does not include any specific API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate this requirement is met. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding the implementation of PDF generation.
gaps: No evidence of PDF generation functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
